overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during light rain. The camera moves through covered plazas with holographic advertisements, covered walkways with botanical planters, and open streets lined with towering buildings and neon signage. The footage is clearly from a high-quality game engine, featuring wet reflective surfaces and dense urban architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza with wet reflective pavement. The camera moves forward beneath large overhead digital billboards, passing a glowing green holographic cube display on the right wall. A pedestrian with an umbrella crosses the plaza in the distance, and vehicles are visible on the street to the left.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway with a glass and metal ceiling structure. Large rectangular planters filled with tropical vegetation line both sides of the corridor. The lighting shifts to artificial ceiling lights, and the street is no longer visible. The camera continues walking forward as a few pedestrians appear in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast plaza surrounded by towering futuristic buildings. Two men in suits approach and pass the camera. The camera looks up to reveal massive vertical holographic advertisements covering the building facades, including a prominent display of a woman's face with blue hair. Futuristic vehicles are parked along the left side of the open area.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open plaza into a street-level pedestrian walkway. On the right, an outdoor restaurant with covered seating and plants is visible. Above, an elevated highway structure spans the street with horizontal digital billboards attached. Vehicles pass by on the wet street to the left as the camera continues forward through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, transitioning from a sheltered plaza into a lush corridor and finally out into a towering urban canyon. It begins in a covered plaza with wet reflective pavement, moving beneath digital billboards and past a glowing green holographic cube. As the camera enters a covered walkway, the open street vanishes, replaced by a glass and metal ceiling and corridors lined with tropical vegetation in large planters. The scene then opens into a vast plaza where the camera looks up toward massive vertical holograms of a blue-haired woman on towering building facades before passing men in suits. Finally, the movement shifts into a street-level pedestrian walkway, passing an outdoor restaurant and moving beneath an elevated highway with horizontal billboards as vehicles glide along the wet road.
